author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: The outer Err branch (line 424-429) in into_storage_and_shape calls arc_inner.storage.as_slice() which panics on GPU storage. Fix: check if storage is GPU. If so, clone the entire storage via TensorStorage::clone() (which already correctly uses clone_buffer for GPU). For CPU, keep the existing slice+to_vec path that extracts just the offset window. This mirrors the inner Err branch at line 418-420.
